generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values order and duty, I'm glad to see our leaders pushing for stronger strategic autonomy. It's not about isolation—it's about ensuring our security in an unpredictable world. Remember how we handled the 2024 crisis? Imagine if we'd had even more control over our critical supply chains. #NationalSecurityFirst #StrongerTogether
